title: Taco Night Messiness
caption: Kashish eating three tacos at once and getting sauce on her chin. Cutest thing ever!

title: Cozy Train Drift
caption: Kashish fell asleep on my shoulder ten minutes after boarding. I couldn't move my arm, but I was so happy.

title: Rain Dance Spontaneity
caption: Caught in a sudden summer downpour. Instead of running, we danced. Drenched but laughing!

title: My Favorite Smile
caption: My absolute favorite smile. Kashish, you make every dark day instantly bright. You look radiant here.

title: Quiet Coffee Morning
caption: Messy morning hair and hot caramel lattes. We sat in comfortable silence for hours. Pure bliss.

title: Holding Hands Forever
caption: Entering the new year holding Kashish's hand. I knew right then, I never want to let go.

title: Midnight Work Support
caption: Staying up late studying. Kashish brought me hot cocoa and stayed up just to keep me company. Love her.

title: Sparkler Magic
caption: One year of us. Sparklers in the night sky, and that warm, cozy hug that melts all my worries away.
